query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: People walk along an urban pathway or transit corridor at night, moving toward a bright rectangular light source in the background. Several figures are visible mid-stride carrying bags, while others stand near vertical structural columns. A large shape fills the immediate left foreground, and small illuminated signs or fixtures dot the surrounding darkness.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white scene of people walking through a dark urban corridor at night, rendered with extreme film grain and analog texture that obscures fine details and surfaces. The tonal range is pushed to extremes, with large areas of the frame swallowed by crushing darkness while the background light source burns into overexposed glare. The silhouetted figures and murky environment create an atmosphere of unease and distress.
